use_cases: Landing page hero sections for SaaS or tech products
Product introduction pages with ambient visual interest
Portfolio or portfolio-like websites seeking minimal aesthetics
Dark-themed website headers with subtle animation
Modern startup landing pages with atmospheric backgrounds
ai_summary: A minimalist hero section featuring an animated canvas with floating white particles that drift upward and fade in/out. The particles have randomized properties including speed, opacity, and fade timing, creating an organic ambient effect against a dark background. This component provides subtle visual interest without overwhelming content, making it ideal for modern tech landing pages seeking clean, sophisticated aesthetics.
